boundary_binding.action_boundary: customer authorization boundary closed by signed mandate
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source records close the exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing or mismatched mandate blocks execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: mandate signature must match account and action

critical_features_preserved: mandate signature must match account and action
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required mandate signature record is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Policy requires exact source-record closure for the requested boundary, and communication tone cannot override that. Escalate until the account, action, and mandate are matched.
open_blockers: mandate signature must match account and action
